body: This PR fixes the AxisTensor `show`, which should not include printing a newline.
title: Fix AxisTensor show

body:
This PR splits the implicit operator tests in efforts to reduce CI times. I've also lowered the frequency of the progress bar output, since things are running faster now.

A step towards closing #837.
title: Split implicit operator tests to reduce ci times

body:
This PR adds performance tests for the axis tensor conversions, specifically the `transform` and `project`.

This should significantly help on the turn-around time for fixing these performance issues, as the test set takes much shorter time than running a full simulation and is more carefully tested for correctness. I've run ClimaCore's test suite and gathered all of the input arguments, and stored them as an array of tuples in 

 - Here are the tests: [test/Geometry/axistensor_conversion_benchmarks.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/842/files#diff-085dd895d03f592bcb3ca091384f1887aa3a83235a76944faacd95a98994bb0b)
 - Copied from `src/`, which now serve as a correctness test: [test/Geometry/transform_project.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/842/files#diff-0729bf1609b3579e09f6d33978e5f2d256b75228e66ea681bb6502603c9483f7)
 - Used project args in ClimaCore's test suite: [test/Geometry/used_project_args.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/842/files#diff-c16be596bbb24b5734adf4679c638216649415c1b75bb95066272df0f12d1ab9)
 - Used transform args in ClimaCore's test suite: [test/Geometry/used_transform_args.jl](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/842/files#diff-fd82480502ff8b15685ddcea975b64778dbc2d0c44bb2c42649f7a2547eafc7c)
title: Add axis tensor tests
